text: OSINTdefender All four crew members, NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, Artemis II commander, NASA astronaut Victor Glover, Artemis II pilot, NASA astronaut Christina Koch, Artemis II mission specialist, and Canadian Space Agency (CSA) astronaut Jeremy Hansen, Artemis II mission specialist have now exited the crew module and are now in the inflatable “front porch.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 所有四名机组人员，阿尔忒弥斯2号指令长、NASA宇航员里德·怀斯曼（Reid Wiseman），阿尔忒弥斯2号飞行员、NASA宇航员维克多·格洛弗（Victor Glover），阿尔忒弥斯2号任务专家、NASA宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫（Christina Koch），以及阿尔忒弥斯2号任务专家、加拿大航天局（CSA）宇航员杰里米·汉森（Jeremy Hansen），现已离开乘员舱，目前位于充气式“前廊”内。推文

text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——自4月1日发射升空以来，阿尔忒弥斯2号的全部四名宇航员首次走出航天器。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042779226202358002/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : It appears that the early warning radar in Qatar was hit by multiple Iranian drones causing more than superficial damage. Multiple hits in the same attack indicates that if air defenses were present, they were overwhelmed or otherwise ineffective. Photos published by Al Jazeera for the first time reveal damage caused by Iranian strikes on the U.S.-made AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) ballistic missile early warning radar in Qatar. The damage appears to be more extensive than what is visible in satellite imagery. https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - Egypt's Intel Observer tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @TheIntelFrog：卡塔尔的预警雷达似乎遭到了多架伊朗无人机的袭击，造成了非表面性的损坏。在同一次袭击中多次命中表明，如果当时有防空系统，它们要么被压制，要么无效。半岛电视台首次发布的照片揭示了伊朗袭击卡塔尔美制AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) 弹道导弹预警雷达所造成的损坏。损坏程度似乎比卫星图像中显示的更为严重。https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - 埃及情报观察员推文

text: WSJ: Both Saudi Arabia and the UAE are refusing to ship oil through the strait while it is under Iranian control. This is an unofficial oil embargo that will lead to higher oil prices and force others to intervene, according to Gulf officials
text_zh: 华尔街日报：沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋均拒绝在霍尔木兹海峡处于伊朗控制下时通过该海峡运输石油。据海湾地区官员称，这是一项非官方的石油禁运，将导致油价上涨并迫使其他国家进行干预。

text: OSINTdefender Personnel are now conducting assessments of the crew inside the module after the hatch was opened. They will be exiting one-by-one imminently. They have now opened the side hatch of the crew module as U.S. Navy divers aid in the process. The Artemis II crew will exit one-by-one. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 舱门打开后，工作人员正在舱内对机组人员进行评估。他们即将逐一撤离。他们现在已经打开了乘员舱的侧舱门，美国海军潜水员正在协助这一过程。阿尔忒弥斯2号机组人员将逐一撤离。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender They have now opened the side hatch of the crew module as U.S. Navy divers aid in the process. The Artemis II crew will exit one-by-one. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 tweet

text: Pakistan's air force (pilots) have a 4-0 record in air-air combat against the Israeli air force (3 during 1967 war and 1 during the 1973 war).

text: OSINTdefender The first of the recovery team fast boats has now arrived at the splashdown location of the crew module. Issues with the onboard communications system seem to be ongoing but, they can hear the crew inside. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042760159785591289/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 第一艘回收小组快艇现已抵达乘员舱的溅落地点。机载通信系统的问题似乎仍在持续，但他们可以听到舱内机组人员的声音。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042760159785591289/video/1 推文

Some important names that are attending, which weren’t mentioned in media extensively, are Baqeri Kani, deputy of the SNSC, and Mohammad Nabavian, a notoriously conservative MP. Overall, this is a VERY heavy delegation which carries a lot of authority and expertise. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Middle East Spectator — MES：— ❗️ 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 / 🇺🇸 最新消息：巴基斯坦公布了伊朗代表团的名单，由86名官员、专家和媒体人员组成。一些出席的重要人物，在媒体上没有被广泛提及，包括最高国家安全委员会副秘书巴盖里·卡尼（Baqeri Kani）和臭名昭著的保守派议员穆罕默德·纳巴维安（Mohammad Nabavian）。总的来说，这是一个非常重量级的代表团，拥有很大的权力和专业知识。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The New York Times: Iran has been unable to locate all of the mines it laid in the Strait of Hormuz, which has prevented the country from quickly complying with President Trump's demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway. Iranian negotiators and a US delegation led by Vice President JD Vance are set to meet in Pakistan for peace talks, which may be complicated by the issue of the mines in the strait. The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps has issued warnings that ships could collide with sea mines, and has published charts showing safe routes, which are limited due to the haphazard mining of the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 《纽约时报》：伊朗一直无法定位其在霍尔木兹海峡布设的所有水雷，这阻碍了该国迅速遵守特朗普总统关于允许更多船只通过该水道的要求。伊朗谈判代表和由副总统JD·万斯（JD Vance）率领的美国代表团定于在巴基斯坦举行和平谈判，这可能会因海峡水雷问题而变得复杂。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队已发出警告称船只可能会与水雷相撞，并发布了显示安全航线的图表，但由于海峡布雷混乱，这些航线有限。@wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: Professor Mohammad Marandi, famous for his high-intensity interviews and debates with Western media outlets, seems to be part of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad Marandi previously served as an advisor to Iranian nuclear negotiators for the JCPOA. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 最新消息：以与西方媒体进行高强度采访和辩论而闻名的穆罕默德·马兰迪（Mohammad Marandi）教授似乎是伊朗伊斯兰堡代表团的一员。马兰迪此前曾担任伊朗核谈判代表的JCPOA顾问。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. intelligence assessments indicate Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles and could retrieve launchers from underground storage areas, contradicting U.S. Defence Secretary Hegseth’s claim that Iran’s missile programme is “functionally destroyed”. While more than half of launchers have been destroyed or trapped, many can be repaired or dug out. Iran’s missile inventory has been roughly halved but still numbers in the thousands. Iran also retains a small inventory of cruise missiles. Some officials are concerned Tehran will use the ceasefire to reconstitute its arsenal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍拥有数千枚弹道导弹，并可能从地下储存区取回发射器，这与美国国防部长赫格塞斯（Hegseth）声称伊朗导弹计划“功能性摧毁”的说法相矛盾。虽然超过一半的发射器已被摧毁或被困，但许多可以修复或挖掘出来。伊朗的导弹库存大约减半，但仍有数千枚。伊朗还保留了少量巡航导弹库存。一些官员担心德黑兰会利用停火来重建其武库。@wfwitness

text: Muhoozi Kainerugaba, Uganda’s military chief: We are going to end ALL diplomatic relations with Türkiye in the next 30 days if they do not address our issues!
text_zh: 穆胡齐·凯内鲁加巴（Muhoozi Kainerugaba），乌干达军事首长：如果土耳其不解决我们的问题，我们将在未来30天内结束与土耳其的所有外交关系！

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a real agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian nation, they will see readiness for an agreement on our side as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive operation, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the capabilities of our nation.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗民族权利，他们也会看到我们达成协议的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗性行动，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的能力来捍卫我们的权利。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Unfortunately, our experience with negotiations with the Americans has always been accompanied by failure and breach of commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations-despite the goodwill of the Iranian side-they attacked us and committed numerous war crimes. We have goodwill, but we do not have trust.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：不幸的是，我们与美国人谈判的经验总是伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗方面表现出善意——他们两次袭击了我们并犯下了无数战争罪行。我们有善意，但我们没有信任。

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese and Israeli diplomats spoke by phone Friday and are planning to meet next week to discuss a ceasefire, the office of Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said in a social media post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）的办公室在社交媒体上发帖称，黎巴嫩和以色列外交官周五进行了电话交谈，并计划下周会面讨论停火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Ghalibaf at Islamabad Airport: Our experience negotiating with the United States has always been marked by failure and broken promises / We have goodwill, but no trust The Speaker of Parliament, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, upon arrival in Islamabad and in response to journalists’ questions about recent remarks by U.S. Vice President Vance, said: ➡️ Unfortunately, our experience in negotiations with the United States has consistently been one of failure and broken commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations—and despite Iran’s goodwill—we were attacked, and multiple war crimes were committed. ➡️ We have goodwill, but we do not have trust. ➡️ In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a genuine agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian people, they will see readiness from us as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive tactic, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the strength of our nation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫在伊斯兰堡机场：我们与美国谈判的经验总是伴随着失败和违背承诺 / 我们有善意，但没有信任。议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在抵达伊斯兰堡时，针对记者关于美国副总统万斯（Vance）近期言论的提问表示：➡️ 不幸的是，我们与美国谈判的经验一直伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，在谈判过程中——尽管伊朗表现出善意——我们两次遭到袭击，并犯下了多起战争罪行。➡️ 我们有善意，但没有信任。➡️ 在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗人民权利，他们也会看到我们的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为徒劳的表演或欺骗性策略，我们准备通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的力量来捍卫我们的权利。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Children of Minab traveling with the Iranian delegation, led by Dr. Ghalibaf. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 Personal belongings left behind by the children, stained with their blood, were taken by the Iranian delegation “Minab 168” to Pakistan as evidence of a U.S. war crime against Iran, and as a symbol of their demand for justice in potential upcoming negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 在卡利巴夫博士率领下，米纳布（Minab）的孩子们随伊朗代表团同行。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 孩子们留下的个人物品，沾满了他们的鲜血，被伊朗代表团“Minab 168”带到巴基斯坦，作为美国对伊朗战争罪行的证据，并作为他们在未来潜在谈判中要求正义的象征。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
